text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 During the current war, most cluster missiles penetrated Israeli air defences – not because they could not be intercepted, but because commanders were forced to conserve scarce Arrow 3 interceptors. According to the report, 61 cluster missiles dispersed…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli Government ministries traded blame over the Arrow interceptor shortage, with the Prime Minister’s Office, the Finance Ministry, the Defence Minister’s Office and the Defence Ministry each insisting they acted correctly. The report’s narrator warned that the “Interceptors Conception” – which brings Israel back to the pre‑October 7 mindset – was publicly identified by the Defence Ministry’s director general, and that “no one can claim later that they weren’t warned”. Prime Minister’s Office: “Prime Minister Netanyahu is the one who directed several times since 2018 to change budget priorities and accelerate production rates for both interceptors and long‑range offensive weapons. The Prime Minister had to overcome fierce opposition on this matter, and indeed, production rates in recent years have been significantly accelerated.” Smotrich’s Office (Minister of Finance): “The Minister ensured full funding for all requirements of the defence establishment during the war – both defence and offence, including interceptor development. There are those who, instead of becoming more efficient and avoiding the massive waste that harms services for Israeli citizens, prefer to spread false libels.” Ministry of Finance: “The transfer of funds and budget approvals throughout the war prove how the Ministry funded the development of interceptors without limits, in accordance with the decisions of the political echelon. The Director General of the Ministry of Defense is the one who determines priorities within the budget. The attempt to shake off responsibility and cast it onto the Treasury raises questions about the ability of those same people to manage the defence budget.” Defence Minister [Israel] Katz’s Office: “The Defence Minister established the acceleration of Arrow production as a central goal. He held over 10 meetings on the subject and was a significant factor in approving the acceleration, which was recently approved retroactively by the Ministerial Committee on Procurement and actually began in 2025. The Minister and his Director General are fully coordinated on this issue as well as others.” Ministry of Defense: “The moves led by the Ministry of Defense over the past year to open additional production lines for the Arrow system, procure critical raw materials, and recruit unique personnel are what enable the stockpile of Arrow interceptors. This was done despite the lack of budgetary backing from the Ministry of Finance. It is a shame that a critical security issue is being turned into a display of passing the buck through deliberate deception.” Narrator: “When we see all this responsibility‑shifting, with no one actually taking charge, someone had better take responsibility now to prevent the next failure.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 在当前的战争中，大多数集束导弹突破了以色列的防空系统——这并非因为它们无法被拦截，而是因为指挥官被迫节省稀缺的“箭-3”拦截弹。据报道，61枚集束导弹散布……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列政府各部门就“箭”式拦截弹短缺问题互相推诿，总理办公室、财政部、国防部长办公室和国防部均坚称自己行事正确。报告的叙述者警告称，“拦截弹构想”——这使以色列回到了10月7日之前的思维模式——已由国防部总干事公开指出，且“没有人能在事后声称他们没有得到警告”。总理办公室：“内塔尼亚胡总理自2018年以来曾多次指示改变预算优先级，并加快拦截弹和远程进攻性武器的生产速度。总理不得不克服对此事的强烈反对，事实上，近年来生产速度已显著加快。”斯莫特里奇办公室（财政部长）：“部长确保了战争期间国防机构所有需求（包括防御和进攻，以及拦截弹开发）的充足资金。有些人宁愿散布虚假诽谤，也不愿提高效率并避免损害以色列公民服务的巨大浪费。”财政部：“战争期间资金的拨付和预算批准证明了财政部如何根据政治层面的决定，无限制地资助了拦截弹的开发。国防部总干事负责确定预算内的优先级。试图推卸责任并将其归咎于财政部的行为，引发了人们对这些人管理国防预算能力的质疑。”国防部长[以色列]卡茨办公室：“国防部长将加快“箭”式导弹生产定为核心目标。他为此召开了10多次会议，是批准加速生产的重要推动者，该计划最近已由部长级采购委员会追溯批准，并于2025年实际开始。部长及其总干事在此问题及其他问题上完全协调一致。”国防部：“国防部过去一年为开启“箭”式系统额外生产线、采购关键原材料和招募专业人员所采取的行动，是实现“箭”式拦截弹库存的基础。尽管财政部缺乏预算支持，但这些工作仍得以完成。将关键的安全问题变成通过蓄意欺骗来推卸责任的表演，实在令人羞愧。”叙述者：“当我们看到所有这些推卸责任的行为，而没有人真正承担责任时，最好现在就有人站出来负责，以防止下一次失败。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Facing a severe Arrow 3 interceptor shortage and months of government inaction, the Director General of Israel’s Ministry of Defence, Amir Eshel, took an unprecedented personal risk. He issued a letter of commitment – a personal guarantee – to defence…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 During the current war, most cluster missiles penetrated Israeli air defences – not because they could not be intercepted, but because commanders were forced to conserve scarce Arrow 3 interceptors. According to the report, 61 cluster missiles dispersed across dozens of locations; only 16 single‑warhead ballistic missiles got through. A senior defence official said the decision not to intercept clusters was intentional, to avoid wasting limited stocks on submunitions that open too early for lower‑altitude systems. Ram Aminach (former head of budget division, Ministry of Defence): “Even though a decision was made to increase the procurement of the Arrow, it will be another two years before we receive the missiles.” Narrator (Speaker 1): “If we rely on the Royal United Services Institute in the UK, a report published there stated that during the war, Israel was left with only 20% of its Arrow interceptor stockpile.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 面对严重的“箭-3”拦截弹短缺和政府数月的无所作为，以色列国防部总干事阿米尔·埃舍尔冒着前所未有的个人风险。他签署了一份承诺书——一份个人担保——给国防……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 在当前的战争中，大多数集束导弹突破了以色列的防空系统——这并非因为它们无法被拦截，而是因为指挥官被迫节省稀缺的“箭-3”拦截弹。据报道，61枚集束导弹散布在数十个地点；只有16枚单弹头弹道导弹突破了防线。一位高级国防官员表示，不拦截集束弹药的决定是故意的，旨在避免将有限的库存浪费在过早打开的低空系统子弹药上。报告还披露，以色列的“箭”式拦截弹库存据称已降至仅剩20%。即使在政府追溯批准增加产量后，仍需两年时间才能收到导弹。预备役准将拉姆·阿米纳赫（国防部预算司前司长）：“尽管已决定增加“箭”式导弹的采购，但我们仍需两年时间才能收到导弹。”叙述者（发言人1）：“如果我们参考英国皇家联合军种国防研究所，那里发表的一份报告指出，在战争期间，以色列的“箭”式拦截弹库存仅剩20%。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Israeli Brig. Gen. (res.) Ram Aminach, former head of the budget division at the Ministry of Defence, warned that the government’s approach of “we’ll manage during the war” does not work for interceptors – “you cannot issue a ‘Tzav 8’ (Emergency procurement)…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Facing a severe Arrow 3 interceptor shortage and months of government inaction, the Director General of Israel’s Ministry of Defence, Amir Eshel, took an unprecedented personal risk. He issued a letter of commitment – a personal guarantee – to defence industries to open two additional production lines immediately, with three more to follow in six months, without budget approval or government authorisation. Finance Ministry and defence officials then clashed publicly, with Eshel warning of a deep “economic conception” that mirrors the pre‑October 7th mindset. Amir Eshel (Director General, Ministry of Defence): “The Iranians are engaged in an accelerated force‑building effort, under a deep sense of urgency for a new and upgraded ballistic array – in both quantity and quality. An Arrow interceptor? Someone needs to produce it, and someone needs to pay for it. Look, this is a large budgetary investment, but it will eventually yield an extraordinary security dividend during an emergency. The Treasury is playing games with the defence establishment, slowing down essential procurement processes, and then they wonder why things don’t happen. Therefore, I warn: the system hasn’t fundamentally changed from what was practised before October 23rd. I fear we are in a deep ‘economic conception’, and that we returned far too quickly to [the mindset of] October 6th.” “Lamed” (senior political official): “Israel Katz went wild on Eshel after this conference, screaming at him. He told him: ‘You will not say there isn’t enough money; you have enough.’ He told him he would no longer be interviewed or speak at conferences – and indeed, Eshel hasn’t appeared since. Katz denies this.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 以色列国防部前预算司司长、预备役准将拉姆·阿米纳赫（Ram Aminach）警告称，政府‘战争期间我们会设法解决’的做法对拦截弹并不适用——‘你无法发布“Tzav 8”（紧急采购）命令……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 面对严重的“箭-3”拦截弹短缺和政府数月的无所作为，以色列国防部总干事阿米尔·埃舍尔（Amir Eshel）冒着前所未有的个人风险，向国防工业发出了一份承诺书——一份个人担保——要求立即增开两条生产线，并在六个月内再增开三条，且无需预算批准或政府授权。随后，财政部和国防部官员公开发生冲突，埃舍尔警告称，这反映了一种深层的“经济观念”，与10月7日之前的思维模式如出一辙。阿米尔·埃舍尔（国防部总干事）：“伊朗人正在加速进行力量建设，他们对建立一支数量和质量上都得到升级的新型弹道导弹部队有着强烈的紧迫感。‘箭’式拦截弹？需要有人生产，也需要有人买单。看，这是一笔巨大的预算投资，但它最终会在紧急情况下产生非凡的安全红利。财政部在与国防机构玩弄权术，拖延必要的采购流程，然后他们又奇怪为什么事情没有进展。因此，我警告：该系统与10月23日之前的做法相比，根本没有发生实质性改变。我担心我们正处于一种深层的‘经济观念’中，而且我们太快回到了10月6日的思维模式。” “Lamed”（高级政治官员）：“以色列·卡茨（Israel Katz）在这次会议后对埃舍尔大发雷霆，对他咆哮。他告诉他：‘你不能说钱不够；你有足够的钱。’他告诉他以后不得再接受采访或在会议上发言——事实上，埃舍尔此后确实再未露面。卡茨否认了这一点。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from Central Command (CENTCOM), an Iranian “shadow fleet” tanker, the M/V Sevan, which was sanctioned yesterday by the U.S. Department of the Treasury, was intercepted by a U.S. Navy helicopter from the USS Pinckney (DDG 91). Per the release, the Sevan is now complying with directives to turn back to Iran and is currently under escort. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布的消息，一艘伊朗“影子船队”油轮M/V Sevan号（昨日刚被美国财政部制裁）被美国海军平克尼号（DDG 91）上的一架直升机拦截。根据发布的消息，Sevan号目前正遵守返回伊朗的指令，并处于护送之下。推文

text: U.S. Central Command Yesterday, M/V Sevan was among 19 “shadow fleet” vessels sanctioned by the U.S. Department of Treasury for activities related to transporting billions of dollars worth of Iranian energy, oil and gas products, including propane and butane, to foreign markets. Earlier today, Sevan was intercepted in the Arabian Sea by a U.S. Navy helicopter from guided-missile destroyer USS Pinckney (DDG 91), and the merchant vessel is currently complying with U.S. military direction to turn back to Iran under escort. U.S. forces continue to enforce U.S. sanctions and fully implement the blockade against ships entering or departing Iranian ports. 37 vessels have been redirected since the start of the blockade. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 昨天，M/V Sevan号是美国财政部因从事运输价值数十亿美元的伊朗能源、石油和天然气产品（包括丙烷和丁烷）至外国市场相关活动而制裁的19艘“影子船队”船只之一。今天早些时候，Sevan号在阿拉伯海被美国海军平克尼号导弹驱逐舰（DDG 91）上的一架直升机拦截，该商船目前正遵守美军指令，在护送下返回伊朗。美军继续执行美国制裁，并全面实施针对进出伊朗港口船只的封锁。自封锁开始以来，已有37艘船只被改道。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Israeli Brig. Gen. Prof. Jacob Nagel, who chaired the “Nagel Committee Report” – a defence roadmap for Israel – revealed that his committee’s recommendation for a dramatic increase in Arrow 3 production was actually a downward compromise; the true requirement…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Brig. Gen. (res.) Ram Aminach, former head of the budget division at the Ministry of Defence, warned that the government’s approach of “we’ll manage during the war” does not work for interceptors – “you cannot issue a ‘Tzav 8’ (Emergency procurement) to an Arrow 3 missile.” During the June 2025 “Twelve‑Day War” (Operation True Promise 3), Iran fired approximately 530‑550 ballistic missiles at Israel. A senior political official said Israel was “very lucky” that U.S. President Trump ended the escalation after 12 days, because the interceptor situation was “not simple.” A plan to octuple Arrow 3 production lines has sat at Israel Aerospace Industries for years, but the government has done nothing. After the war, the Ministerial Committee for Procurement approved only a limited budget for partial replenishment, not the systemic industrial expansion requested by the IDF. Brig. Gen. (res.) Ram Aminach (former head of budget division, Ministry of Defence): “When the government looked [at the situation] and prepared, they basically said, ‘Wait, we’ll manage during the war.’ But you can ‘manage’ during a war when it comes to personnel. You tell a reservist to show up, and you pay him. You issue him a ‘Tzav 8’ and he arrives. You cannot issue a ‘Tzav 8’ to an Arrow 3 missile. If it’s on the shelf, it’s there. If it’s not on the shelf, all you can do is check if it’s on someone else’s shelf and see if they agree to sell it to you. … The defence establishment is receiving a budget that is too low, and the Israeli government is taking risks that are too great with the security of the State of Israel.” “Yud” (senior political official): “We are very lucky that Trump ended the event after 12 days, because the interceptor situation was not simple. Understand this: a plan has been sitting at Israel Aerospace Industries for years to octuple the production lines for Arrow 3, and the government is doing nothing with it. This is simply an abandonment of the home front.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 以色列准将雅各布·内格尔（Jacob Nagel）教授（曾主持“内格尔委员会报告”——以色列的国防路线图）透露，他委员会关于大幅增加“箭-3”导弹产量的建议实际上是一个向下妥协的结果；真正的需求……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列预备役准将拉姆·阿米纳赫（Ram Aminach，前国防部预算司司长）警告称，政府“战争期间我们会设法解决”的方法对拦截弹并不适用——“你不能给‘箭-3’导弹下达‘Tzav 8’（紧急征用令）。”在2025年6月的“十二日战争”（“真实承诺3”行动）期间，伊朗向以色列发射了约530-550枚弹道导弹。一位高级政治官员表示，以色列“非常幸运”，美国总统特朗普在12天后结束了局势升级，因为拦截弹的情况“并不简单”。以色列航空航天工业公司多年来一直有一项将“箭-3”生产线增加八倍的计划，但政府什么也没做。战争结束后，部长级采购委员会仅批准了有限的预算用于部分补充，而非以色列国防军所要求的系统性工业扩张。预备役准将拉姆·阿米纳赫（前国防部预算司司长）：“当政府审视（局势）并进行准备时，他们基本上说，‘等等，战争期间我们会设法解决。’但当涉及人员时，你可以在战争中‘设法解决’。你告诉预备役军人报到，你付钱给他。你给他下达‘Tzav 8’，他就到了。你不能给‘箭-3’导弹下达‘Tzav 8’。如果它在架子上，它就在那儿。如果它不在架子上，你唯一能做的就是看看它是否在别人的架子上，并看他们是否同意卖给你。……国防机构获得的预算太低，以色列政府在以色列国的安全问题上冒了太大的风险。”“尤德”（高级政治官员）：“我们非常幸运，特朗普在12天后结束了事件，因为拦截弹的情况并不简单。要明白这一点：以色列航空航天工业公司多年来一直有一项将‘箭-3’生产线增加八倍的计划，而政府对此毫无作为。这简直是对后方的遗弃。”@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ 📝 Collapse on Mali's fronts 📝 What happened in Mali on April 25, 2026? This morning, a coalition of Tuareg separatists and radicals from "Al-Qaeda" launched a coordinated attack on Mali — from the northern Kidal to the capital region of Kayes. 🔻 What happened today? ➡️ The main success of the anti-government coalition — the capture of Kidal . Army units and the African Corps hold a key strongpoint in the south — a former UN base. The garrison of the southern base commands the main approaches, containing the enemy's attempts to develop their success. Among the attackers, the notorious Abdurrahman Zaza was spotted — the person responsible for the tragedy in Tin-Zaoutin in 2024. ➡️ In Gao , separatists and Islamists attempted to penetrate the city from the north. By evening, most attacks were repelled, and militants were driven out of the settlement. ➡️ The attack on Mali's capital — Bamako , began at 5 a.m. with a suicide bombing at the residence of the defense minister. Over a hundred militants participated in the assault with UAV support. Reports indicate that some attackers used Malian army uniforms for infiltration. At this moment, the attack has been repelled, the minister is alive, government forces are conducting a counteroffensive, pursuing scattered groups of Islamists in the suburbs with support from the local population. ➡️ In Sevare , militants attempted to penetrate the city disguised as civilians, which failed. This was followed by a motorcycle assault, which was repelled by Russian military personnel. Despite Islamist claims of controlling the city, the majority of it remains firmly under army control. The internet is now full of fakes: from old videos to unconfirmed statements. Also, many Russian media outlets spread claims about the capture of a military base, although it was actually a police camp. 📌 Mali is not Syria. A collapse of defenses on a nationwide scale was avoided. At least, this time. 🖍 However, the Malian army demonstrated a complete loss of command and control when facing a non-linear threat. The infiltration of militants in army uniforms in Bamako and Kayes is evidence of a deep failure in counterintelligence and the absence of a friend-or-foe identification system. Moreover, the army became fixated on the tactic of holding individual positions, often outside cities. While the enemy seizes control of mobility, logistics, and most importantly, the initiative, imposing battles simultaneously on five fronts. 🚩 There is also a final blurring of boundaries between the "political" separatism of the Tuaregs and the "religious" extremism of "Al-Qaeda". This alliance proves that despite all contradictions, groups are willing to act against a common enemy, going "all in".
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版：转发自 @ 📝 马里战线崩溃 📝 2026年4月25日马里发生了什么？今天早上，图阿雷格分裂分子和“基地”组织激进分子组成的联盟对马里发动了协同攻击——从北部的基达尔（Kidal）到首都所在的卡伊（Kayes）地区。🔻 今天发生了什么？➡️ 反政府联盟的主要成功——占领了基达尔。军队和非洲军团在南部守住了一个关键据点——一个前联合国基地。南部基地的驻军控制了主要进路，遏制了敌人扩大战果的企图。在袭击者中，发现了臭名昭著的阿卜杜拉赫曼·扎扎（Abdurrahman Zaza）——2024年廷扎瓦滕（Tin-Zaoutin）悲剧的责任人。➡️ 在加奥（Gao），分裂分子和伊斯兰主义者试图从北部渗透进城。到傍晚时分，大部分袭击被击退，武装分子被赶出了定居点。➡️ 对马里首都巴马科（Bamako）的袭击于凌晨5点开始，袭击者对国防部长官邸发动了自杀式炸弹袭击。一百多名武装分子在无人机支持下参与了突袭。有报道称，一些袭击者身穿马里军装进行渗透。目前，袭击已被击退，部长安然无恙，政府军正在进行反攻，在当地民众的支持下在郊区追击分散的伊斯兰主义者群体。➡️ 在塞瓦雷（Sevare），武装分子试图伪装成平民潜入城市，但失败了。随后发生了摩托车突袭，被俄罗斯军事人员击退。尽管伊斯兰主义者声称控制了该市，但大部分地区仍牢牢掌握在军队手中。互联网上现在充斥着假消息：从旧视频到未经证实的声明。此外，许多俄罗斯媒体散布了关于占领军事基地的说法，尽管实际上那只是一个警察营地。📌 马里不是叙利亚。全国范围内的防御崩溃得以避免。至少这次是这样。🖍 然而，马里军队在面对非线性威胁时表现出了指挥和控制的完全丧失。巴马科和卡伊武装分子身穿军装渗透的事实，证明了反间谍工作的严重失败以及敌我识别系统的缺失。此外，军队过于执着于坚守个别阵地的战术，这些阵地往往位于城市之外。而敌人则夺取了机动性、后勤，最重要的是，夺取了主动权，同时在五条战线上强加战斗。🚩 图阿雷格人的“政治”分裂主义与“基地”组织的“宗教”极端主义之间的界限也最终变得模糊。这种联盟证明，尽管存在所有矛盾，各组织仍愿意为了共同的敌人而行动，进行“孤注一掷”。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 Here are more maps on the status of various oil depots in Russia and Ukraine. The latest SentinelHub imagery available was used, often only a few days old. The oil is not a major part of the Ukrainian economy but the depot of Kremenchuck was added here because it is the heart of central and eastern Ukraine energy infrastructure. The facility has been targeted multiple times, especially this winter. Primorsk and Ust-Luga are both vital assets for the Russian export market. Their disruption affects this very lucrative business. Fedosia and the Altas oil depot are both well placed to support the Russian army in Ukraine. It is surprisingly difficult to gain accurate information regarding the capacity of each oil depot. Based on satellite imagery and various footage, the inital and real (following strikes) capacity of Fedosia and Atlas are the following: Fedosia: 1,700k bbl, 500k remaining (30%) Atlas: 1,000k bbl, 73k remaining (73%) We are waiting for good weather to see how Tuapse is going now that the fire has finally ended. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 以下是关于俄罗斯和乌克兰各油库状况的更多地图。使用了最新的SentinelHub影像，通常只有几天大。石油不是乌克兰经济的主要部分，但克列门丘克（Kremenchuck）油库被加在这里，因为它是乌克兰中部和东部能源基础设施的核心。该设施多次成为目标，尤其是在这个冬天。普里莫尔斯克（Primorsk）和乌斯季-卢加（Ust-Luga）都是俄罗斯出口市场的重要资产。它们的破坏影响了这项利润丰厚的业务。费奥多西亚（Fedosia）和阿特拉斯（Atlas）油库位置优越，可以支持俄罗斯在乌克兰的军队。获取有关每个油库容量的准确信息出奇地困难。根据卫星图像和各种镜头，费奥多西亚和阿特拉斯在袭击前后的实际容量如下：费奥多西亚：170万桶，剩余50万桶（30%）；阿特拉斯：100万桶，剩余7.3万桶（73%）。我们正在等待好天气，看看图阿普谢（Tuapse）在火灾终于结束后现在的情况。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 | Iran’s FM will return from Muscat to Islamabad & part of Iran’s delegation returned to Tehran for consultation — Mehr After meeting with Pakistani officials and conveying Iran's positions and views regarding any agreement to completely end the war, Araghchi arrived in Muscat on Saturday evening. According to the schedule announced by the MFA, the Foreign Minister is expected to visit Pakistan again after finishing his trip to Oman and before traveling to Russia. The delegation that returned to Tehran for consultation and to receive necessary instructions, are expected to rejoin Araghchi in Islamabad on Sunday night. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 | 伊朗外交部长将从马斯喀特返回伊斯兰堡，部分伊朗代表团已返回德黑兰进行磋商 — Mehr 在与巴基斯坦官员会面并传达了伊朗关于任何彻底结束战争协议的立场和观点后，阿拉格希于周六傍晚抵达马斯喀特。根据外交部公布的时间表，预计外交部长在结束对阿曼的访问并前往俄罗斯之前，将再次访问巴基斯坦。返回德黑兰进行磋商并接受必要指示的代表团预计将于周日晚在伊斯兰堡与阿拉格希会合。 @FotrosResistancee

text: 🇺🇸 🇦🇪 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 The U.S. is amassing forces at Al Dhafra Air Base in the UAE A total of 12 U.S. Navy F/A-18 fighter jets have been deployed to the base. text: 🛢 The 1973 oil embargo first had no effect on the market, it even gained ~2% within the first week. Then slowly reality hit. Over the next six months the S&P lost ~15% until the embargo was lifted... just to crash another ~40% afterwards. Everyone anticipates a rally when Hormuz reopens. But what if the damage to the global economy is already so severe that it kicks off the next stagflationary period? 🔗 Lukas Ekwueme
text_zh: 🛢 1973年的石油禁运最初对市场没有影响，甚至在第一周内还上涨了约2%。随后现实慢慢显现。在接下来的六个月里，标普指数下跌了约15%，直到禁运解除……随后又暴跌了约40%。每个人都期待霍尔木兹海峡重新开放时会出现反弹。但如果对全球经济的损害已经如此严重，以至于引发了下一轮滞胀期呢？ 🔗 Lukas Ekwueme

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Following Iran’s first direct attack in April 2024 – 185 drones, 36 cruise missiles and 120 ballistic missiles – no emergency cabinet session was held to approve additional Arrow 3 production lines. Six months later, a second attack of over 200 ballistic…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Brig. Gen. Prof. Jacob Nagel, who chaired the “Nagel Committee Report” – a defence roadmap for Israel – revealed that his committee’s recommendation for a dramatic increase in Arrow 3 production was actually a downward compromise; the true requirement was even higher. Yet it took 15 months for the government to even partially implement the proposal, and then only a fraction. A senior defence official (“N”) expressed disbelief that two direct Iranian missile salvos and an imminent Israeli counter‑strike failed to break the political deadlock over interceptor stockpiles. Professor Jacob Nagel said: “After my committee, many said, ‘No, what are you thinking? We think there are too many Arrow interceptors. Why did you recommend increasing them by such and such an amount?’ By the way, our recommendation on how many Arrow missiles to increase by was a compromise. We actually thought perhaps we needed even more. … It took almost a year and three months to come and implement just a part of our decision – not even the whole thing. Why? Because of bureaucratic processes. … [Ironically] that was actually the fastest thing ever done in the history of the State of Israel.” A senior defence official (“N”) said: “It is simply insane. The Iranians fire at us twice, hundreds of missiles, and it doesn’t move the needle. After the Nagel Committee, it is already known that we are about to launch an attack on Iran. And yet, it still doesn’t move anything. It is clear to everyone that there is not enough Arrow 3.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 在伊朗2024年4月首次直接袭击（185架无人机、36枚巡航导弹和120枚弹道导弹）后，没有召开紧急内阁会议来批准额外的“箭-3”生产线。六个月后，第二次袭击超过200枚弹道导弹……" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列准将雅各布·内格尔教授（Jacob Nagel）曾主持“内格尔委员会报告”（以色列的国防路线图），他透露，他的委员会建议大幅增加“箭-3”产量的建议实际上是一个向下妥协的结果；真正的需求甚至更高。然而，政府花了15个月才部分实施该提案，而且只实施了一小部分。一位高级国防官员（“N”）表示，他无法相信两次直接的伊朗导弹齐射和即将到来的以色列反击未能打破关于拦截弹库存的政治僵局。雅各布·内格尔教授说：“在我的委员会之后，许多人说，‘不，你在想什么？我们认为“箭”式拦截弹太多了。你为什么要建议增加这么多？’顺便说一句，我们关于增加多少“箭”式导弹的建议是一个妥协。我们实际上认为也许我们需要更多。……花了将近一年零三个月才实施了我们决定的一部分——甚至不是全部。为什么？因为官僚程序。……[讽刺的是]这实际上是以色列国历史上做过的最快的事情。”一位高级国防官员（“N”）说：“这简直是疯了。伊朗人两次向我们开火，数百枚导弹，却毫无动静。在内格尔委员会之后，大家都知道我们即将对伊朗发动袭击。然而，它仍然没有推动任何事情。每个人都很清楚，“箭-3”是不够的。” @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 Обвал на малийских фронтах 📝 Что случилось в Мали 25 апреля 2026 года? Сегодня с утра объединенные силы туарегских сепаратистов и радикалов из «Аль-Каиды» предприняли скоординированную атаку на Мали — от северного Кидаля до столичного региона Кати. 🔻 Что произошло за сегодня? ➡️ Главный успех коалиции антиправительственных сил — взятие Кидаля . Армейские части и Африканский Корпус удерживают ключевой опорный пункт на юге — бывшую базу ООН. Гарнизон южной базы простреливает основные направления, купируя попытки противника развить успех. В рядах нападавших замечен одиозный Абдурахман Заза — виновник трагедии в Тин-Заутине 2024 года. ➡️ В Гао сепаратисты и исламисты попытались проникнуть в город с севера. К вечеру большинство атак удалось отразить, а также выбить боевиков из населенного пункта. ➡️ Нападение на столицу Мали — Бамако , началось в 5 утра с подрыва смертника у резиденции министра обороны. В накате участвовали более сотни боевиков при поддержке БЛА. Сообщается, что часть нападавших использовала форму малийской армии для инфильтрации. На данный момент атака отбита, министр жив, правительственные силы проводят контрнаступление, преследуя, при поддержке местного населения, разрозненные группы исламистов в пригородах. ➡️ В Севаре боевики пытались проникнуть в город под видом мирных жителей, что им не удалось. За этим последовал накат на мотоциклах, который был отбит российскими военнослужащими. Несмотря на заявления исламистов о контроле над городом, большая его часть уверенно находится под контролем армии. В сети сейчас полно фейков: от старых видеороликов до заявлений без подтверждений. Также во многих российских СМИ распространялись заявления о взятии военной базы, хотя это был полицейский лагерь. 📌 Мали — не Сирия. Коллапса обороны в масштабах всей страны удалось избежать. По-крайней мере, на этот раз. 🖍 Правда малийская армия продемонстрировала полную потерю управления при столкновении с нелинейной угрозой. Инфильтрация боевиков в форме армии в Бамако и Кати — это свидетельство глубокого провала контрразведки и отсутствия системы распознавания «свой-чужой». К тому же армия оказалась зациклена на тактике удержания отдельных позиций, часто вне города. В то время как противник забирает под контроль мобильность, логистику и, что самое важное, инициативу, навязывая бои сразу на пяти направлениях. 🚩 Происходит и окончательное стирание границ между «политическим» сепаратизмом туарегов и «религиозным» экстремизмом «Аль-Каиды». Эта связка доказывает, что несмотря на все противоречия, группы готовы выступить против единого врага пойдя «ва-банк». ❗️ Ситуацию удалось стабилизировать по-большей части, благодаря вмешательству Африканского Корпуса , который фактически «цементировал» разваливающуюся оборону в Севаре и Бамако . Однако бесконечно латать дыры русскими штыками невозможно — малийскому руководству пора переходить от пассивного созерцания к тотальной реформе разведки и управления, иначе следующий синхронный удар может стать для республики фатальным . 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #Мали #Россия 💀 @rybar_africa — там, где политика горячее экватора 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 马里战线崩溃 📝 2026年4月25日马里发生了什么？今天早上，图阿雷格分裂主义者和“基地”组织激进分子的联合部队对马里发动了协同袭击——从北部的基达尔到首都卡蒂地区。 🔻 今天发生了什么？ ➡️ 反政府武装联盟的主要成就是占领了基达尔。军队部队和非洲军团守住了南部的一个关键据点——前联合国基地。南部基地的驻军控制了主要方向，阻止了敌人扩大战果的企图。在袭击者行列中发现了臭名昭著的阿卜杜拉赫曼·扎扎——2024年廷扎瓦滕悲剧的罪魁祸首。 ➡️ 在加奥，分裂主义者和伊斯兰主义者试图从北部潜入城市。到傍晚，大多数袭击已被击退，武装分子也被赶出了该定居点。 ➡️ 对马里首都巴马科的袭击始于凌晨5点，一名自杀式炸弹袭击者在国防部长官邸引爆炸弹。超过一百名武装分子在无人机的支持下参与了这次袭击。据报道，部分袭击者身穿马里军队制服进行渗透。目前袭击已被击退，部长安然无恙，政府军正在进行反攻，并在当地民众的支持下，在郊区追击分散的伊斯兰主义者团体。 ➡️ 在塞瓦雷，武装分子试图伪装成平民潜入城市，但未成功。随后发生了摩托车冲锋，被俄罗斯军人击退。尽管伊斯兰主义者声称控制了该市，但其大部分地区仍稳固地处于军队控制之下。网络上现在充斥着假消息：从旧视频到未经证实的声明。此外，许多俄罗斯媒体传播了关于占领军事基地的声明，尽管那只是一个警察营地。 📌 马里不是叙利亚。全国范围内的防御崩溃得以避免。至少这次是这样。 🖍 诚然，马里军队在面对非线性威胁时表现出了完全的指挥失控。武装分子身穿军队制服渗透到巴马科和卡蒂，证明了反间谍工作的严重失败和缺乏“敌我识别”系统。此外，军队陷入了固守个别阵地（通常在城市外）的战术中。而敌人则夺取了机动性、后勤，最重要的是，夺取了主动权，强行在五个方向同时开战。 🚩 图阿雷格“政治”分裂主义与“基地”组织“宗教”极端主义之间的界限正在最终消失。这种联系证明，尽管存在所有矛盾，各团体已准备好孤注一掷，共同对抗同一个敌人。 ❗️ 局势在很大程度上得以稳定，这要归功于非洲军团的干预，他们实际上“加固”了塞瓦雷和巴马科摇摇欲坠的防御。然而，用俄罗斯刺刀无休止地修补漏洞是不可能的——马里领导层是时候从被动观望转向对情报和管理进行全面改革了，否则下一次同步打击对共和国来说可能是致命的。 📍 高清地图 📍 英文版 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #马里 #俄罗斯 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 Prior to the October 7 attacks IDF chief of staff Herzi Halevi tried to meet Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu five times to discuss a shortage of Arrow interceptor missiles, but each meeting was cancelled – often hours beforehand. When a budget…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Following Iran’s first direct attack in April 2024 – 185 drones, 36 cruise missiles and 120 ballistic missiles – no emergency cabinet session was held to approve additional Arrow 3 production lines. Six months later, a second attack of over 200 ballistic missiles struck, yet monthly interceptor production remained “ridiculous” and stocks continued to dwindle. “Four days later, October 7th arrived. The focus shifts to the war against Hamas, and perhaps later Lebanon, but six months later, Iran returns to the consciousness in a big way. In April 2024, a major event occurred. For the first time, the Iranians fired directly at Israel. This was what became known as the ‘Night of the UAVs.’ 185 of them were launched at Israel, along with 36 cruise missiles and about 120 ballistic missiles. The Iranians proved their seriousness; we know they have thousands of ballistic missiles in their arsenal, while conversely, we have far fewer interceptors specifically designed for this. The next day, you would probably assume an emergency meeting was convened and additional production lines for Arrow 3 were approved. Well, no. Not even a meeting on the subject took place. Not in the government, not in the cabinet – nothing. Six months later, another Iranian attack. The pretext: the assassination of the head of Hamas’s political bureau, Ismail Haniyeh, in Tehran. This time, more than 200 ballistic missiles are launched here. Arrow 3 interceptors are running low, and there is no solution. The production rate has not increased, as if nothing had happened. We cannot reveal numbers, but the quantity of Arrow 3 interceptors produced per month back then was ridiculous.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 在10月7日袭击发生前，以色列国防军参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维曾五次试图会见以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡，讨论“箭”式拦截导弹短缺的问题，但每次会议都被取消——通常是提前几小时。当预算……" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 在伊朗2024年4月首次直接袭击（185架无人机、36枚巡航导弹和120枚弹道导弹）后，没有召开紧急内阁会议来批准额外的“箭-3”生产线。六个月后，第二次袭击超过200枚弹道导弹袭来，但每月的拦截弹产量仍然“荒谬”，库存继续减少。“四天后，10月7日到了。焦点转向了对哈马斯的战争，也许后来是黎巴嫩，但六个月后，伊朗以一种巨大的方式回到了人们的意识中。2024年4月，发生了一件大事。伊朗人首次直接向以色列开火。这就是后来被称为‘无人机之夜’的事件。其中185架被发射到以色列，还有36枚巡航导弹和约120枚弹道导弹。伊朗人证明了他们的认真；我们知道他们的武库中有数千枚弹道导弹，而相反，我们专门为此设计的拦截弹要少得多。第二天，你可能会认为召开了紧急会议并批准了“箭-3”的额外生产线。嗯，没有。甚至连关于这个主题的会议都没有举行。政府没有，内阁也没有——什么都没有。六个月后，又发生了一次伊朗袭击。借口是哈马斯政治局局长伊斯梅尔·哈尼亚在德黑兰被暗杀。这一次，超过200枚弹道导弹在这里发射。“箭-3”拦截弹快用完了，而且没有解决方案。产量没有增加，好像什么都没发生过一样。我们不能透露数字，但当时每月生产的“箭-3”拦截弹数量是荒谬的。” @wfwitness

text: 📝 Иранская война 📝 главные события к исходу 25 апреля В условиях конфликта с коалицией все средства хороши. Так подумали в Тегеране и, по данным западных СМИ, пригрозили отключить странам Персидского залива Интернет: речь идет о возможности повредить подводные кабели. ➡️ Между тем блокада Ормузского пролива сказывается на экономике Исламской республики. Иранцы в качестве временного нефтехранилища решили использовать 30-летний списанный танкер Nasha. Судно годами стояло пустым. ➡️ Не всегда вина за кризис с поставками лежит на КСИР. Так, у Африканского рога активизировались сомалийские пираты, которые захватили танкер Honour 25, отправившийся 20 февраля в ОАЭ . На судне 17 человек экипажа — граждане Пакистана, Индии, Шри-Ланки, Мьянмы. ➡️ Не менее интересные события происходят в Ираке , в частности на территории курдской автономии. Пока местные борятся с беспилотниками, элиту ловят на коррупции и финансовых махинациях. Попался на этом младший сын бывшего лидера курдской автономии Масуда Барзани . ➡️ В священном для шиитов городе Кербела произошла перестрелка с участием членов «Сарайя ас-Салям» — группировки, подконтрольной Муктаде ас-Садру . С кем еще – неизвестно, однако деятельность организации на территории одноименной провинции принято «заморозить». ➡️ Также важные события пришлись на Ливан , где перемирие уже десятки раз нарушено. В качестве мести израильтянам бойцы движения «Хезболла» произвели пуск нескольких ракет и дронов-камикадзе, которые были перехвачены. ➡️ Израильские войска в ответ нанесли концентрированные удары по нескольким населенным пунктам, в частности городу Сафад аль-Батих , где погибли несколько мирных жителей. В АОИ же целью назвали позиции спецподразделения «Радван». ➡️ Ну и под огонь израильтян традиционно попал сектор Газа . На территории палестинского анклава впервые за 20 лет проходят муниципальные выборы. Видимо, на их фоне израильский ультраправый кабинет и принял решение усилить атаки на палестинцев. 📎 Карты в высоком разрешении: 🔸 Очаги нестабильности ( ru ; en ) #дайджест #Израиль #Ирак #Иран #Ливан #Сирия #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 伊朗战争 📝 4月25日结束时的主要事件 在与联盟的冲突中，一切手段都是合理的。德黑兰方面显然是这样想的，据西方媒体报道，他们威胁要切断波斯湾国家的互联网：这指的是破坏海底电缆的可能性。 ➡️ 与此同时，对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁正在影响伊斯兰共和国的经济。伊朗人决定使用一艘30年船龄的报废油轮“Nasha”号作为临时储油库。这艘船多年来一直空置。 ➡️ 供应危机的责任并不总是归咎于伊斯兰革命卫队。例如，索马里海盗在非洲之角变得活跃，他们劫持了2月20日前往阿联酋的“Honour 25”号油轮。船上有17名船员——分别是巴基斯坦、印度、斯里兰卡和缅甸公民。 ➡️ 伊拉克，特别是库尔德自治区境内，也发生了同样有趣的事件。当当地人与无人机作战时，精英阶层却因腐败和金融欺诈被抓。库尔德自治区前领导人马苏德·巴尔扎尼的小儿子就因此被捕。 ➡️ 在什叶派圣城卡尔巴拉，发生了涉及“萨拉亚·萨拉姆”（Saraya al-Salam）成员的交火——这是一个受穆克塔达·萨德尔控制的组织。与谁交火尚不清楚，但该组织在同名省份的活动已被决定“冻结”。 ➡️ 同样重要的事件发生在黎巴嫩，那里的停火协议已被破坏数十次。为了报复以色列人，“真主党”运动的战士发射了几枚火箭弹和自杀式无人机，但被拦截。 ➡️ 以色列军队作为回应，对几个定居点进行了集中打击，特别是萨法德·阿尔巴蒂赫镇，造成几名平民死亡。以色列国防军称目标是“拉德万”特种部队的阵地。 ➡️ 当然，加沙地带传统上再次遭到以色列人的炮火。在巴勒斯坦飞地，20年来首次举行市政选举。显然，在这一背景下，以色列极右翼内阁决定加强对巴勒斯坦人的袭击。 📎 高清地图： 🔸 不稳定热点 ( ru ; en ) #摘要 #以色列 #伊拉克 #伊朗 #黎巴嫩 #叙利亚 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: OSINTtechnical Iranian negotiators have passed messages to the US asking Trump to tone down his threats -WSJ Iranian diplomats reportedly believe that the hardliners will be more open to negotiations if Trump stops threatening them so much. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗谈判代表已向美国传达信息，要求特朗普降低威胁调门 - WSJ 据报道，伊朗外交官认为，如果特朗普停止对他进行如此多的威胁，强硬派将更愿意进行谈判。推文

text: WarMonitor A top White House official tells Politico that Kash Patel may be the next senior official to be thrown under the bus, saying “it’s only a matter of time.” tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一位白宫高级官员告诉 Politico，卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）可能是下一个被抛弃的高级官员，并称“这只是时间问题”。推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF says it struck Hezbollah buildings across several areas of southern Lebanon used to advance attacks on troops and against Israel. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军表示，他们袭击了黎巴嫩南部多个地区的真主党建筑，这些建筑被用于推进针对部队和以色列的袭击。推文
